original_abstract: This research explores the implementation of religious character education programs and assesses their tangible influence on students' daily lives. Employing a descriptive qualitative methodology, data were gathered through semi-structured interviews, field observations, and comprehensive documentation. The findings indicate that while the religious character education program at MI Nurul Yaqin Surabaya is well-structured and functioning smoothly, there remains significant potential for refinement to enhance its overall effectiveness. To build on this progress, it is recommended that the madrasa conduct rigorous periodic evaluations, provide specialized teacher training to improve pedagogical delivery, and foster stronger partnerships with parents to reinforce religious values at home. By adopting these measures, MI Nurul Yaqin can ensure its character education initiatives meet their strategic objectives and foster holistic student development.
humanized_abstract: This study aims to describe the implementation of religious character education program at MI Nurul Yaqin Surabaya and to know the tangible effects of the program on the students’ life. This study uses descriptive qualitative research method. The data were collected by means of instrument in the form of deep interview, field observation, and documentation. The results of the study show that the Religious Character Education Program in MI Nurul Yaqin Surabaya has been arranged systematically and has undergone implementation in accordance with the plan, but still needs improvement. Therefore, the madrasa is suggested to conduct a study on the implementation of the program periodically, to carry out teacher training aimed at enhancing teacher’s pedagogical skills, and to strengthen the communication with parents in order to fortify religious value implanted in the students. Thus, the implementation of character education program at MI Nurul Yaqin Surabaya is expected to achieve the planned goals and to produce students with global excellence.
